blended.narrative: Horseshoe Resort is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
